REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (815 Colby St, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for and with David Keeler by zoom.
Tim Hawko (listing Agent) by zoom.
Eva He (Buyer's Agent) by zoom.

No one appeared to place an overbid. The sale was confirmed at $833,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court intends to grant the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $398,000.00 is required. The matter is under submission. The Court noted that the Beneficiary is a Nicaragua citizen and informed Ms. Alavi that she needs to provide notice to the Nicaragua Consulate on future petitions.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2020 Advanced From Sep-09-20 To Jul-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz appeared by zoom for David Keeler (Petitioner).

The Court noted that a minimum bond is $20,000.00, and that the proof of publication refers to an amended petition, but there is no amended petition. Mr. Schultz acknowledged the amount of the bond, stated that the notice that was sent to the newspaper said amended notice, that the newspaper took it upon themselves to write amended petition and that it was not caught when it was proof read. The Court questions whether there are any changes in the screening form as it was submitted more than five years ago. Mr. Schultz stated that there is no change in the screening form and that the only potential conflict may be with fees from the conservatorship that are due to Mr. Keeler and his Attorney. The Court questions whether there is anyone else who could serve. Mr. Schultz stated that there were Friends around Mr. Edwards, but they were problematic, that they only knew of a paternal relative who is an Aunt in the Mid-West and that when they filed this petition, they found that there is a maternal half-brother in Nicaragua. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for August 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
